one_time_description: Government of Canada funding of $1,338,878 not in prior year or budget - likely related to Coastal GasLink/pipeline negotiations or COVID; also large Province of BC funding of $1,083,051 vs $135,861 prior year
economic_notes: Yinka Dene Economic Development Limited Partnership reported under modified equity method with accumulated equity of $859,082 on $500,000 advance. FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership (1,014 units) and FN (PTP) General Partner Inc. (1 share) also held as investments.
notes: Audit is qualified - comprehensive property and equipment listing not completed per CICA handbook PS-3150, so property/equipment values and equity may be understated. Restricted cash includes housing reserves $115,189 and forestry deposit $3,670 and secured revenue trust $183,402. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,970,975 + Gov of Canada $1,338,878 + Carrier Sekani $277,456 + CMHC $33,044 + FNHA $112,246 + Northern Health $35,000 + PGNAETA $46,622 + Province of BC $1,083,051 = $4,897,272 (note: some items like Carrier Sekani may be transfer payments). Replacement and operating reserves reclassified from liabilities, CMHC adjustments made in 2020. Very large revenue increase from ~$3.7M to ~$7.1M year over year driven by Government of Canada and Province of BC funding increases. Long-term debt reduced significantly from $4,405,451 to $2,948,438.
